chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.S-539 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Hearing of Case 1. For orders on office objections No.1 to 4 as at “A”. 2. For hearing of CMA No.4497/2025 (U/R-14 SCCR). 3. For hearing of main case..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 14.07.2025 Mr. Muhammad Fazil Rind, Advocate for petitioners a/w petitioners. Mr. Ali Haider Saleem, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh. Mr. K.A Vaswani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh. PI Muhammad Nawaz on behalf of SSP Sujawal. SIP Mushtaq Ahmed, SHO, P.S Daro..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Petitioners are present in person along with their counsel. Petitioner No.1 Mst. Asma submits that she has contracted marriage of her free will in accordance with sharia with Noor Muhammad Lashari, petitioner No.2, due to which her parents are annoyed. The petitioner contends that they apprehend danger to their lives on account of un-ceremonial marriage. On notice, Superintendent of Police District Sujawal and SHO, P.S Daro have filed their replies in which they have stated that no harassment has been caused to the petitioners and they will ensure that no harassment is caused to the petitioners. However, respondents No.6 to 11 are called absent despite of service. SHO, P.S Daro has confirmed that no FIR on account of marriage of the petitioners is registered at P.S Daro. Counsel for the petitioners is satisfied with the undertaking filed by the respondent No.2 and 4 and submits that this petition may be disposed of with direction to the police to provide protection to the petitioners. The petition stands disposed of with directions to the respondents No.2, 3 and 4 to conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law and provide protection to the petitioners and ensure that no harassment is caused to the petitioners on account of their free will marriage.

Counsel for the petitioners is satisfied with the undertaking filed by the respondent No.2 and 4 and submits that this petition may be disposed of with direction to the police to provide protection to the petitioners. The petition stands disposed of with directions to the respondents No.2, 3 and 4 to conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law and provide protection to the petitioners and ensure that no harassment is caused to the petitioners on account of their free will marriage. JUDGE Ayaz Gul
